name: Alaric Schmidt // Mystery
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Request

Alaric was always such a mystery to you. All you knew was his first name and the fact he was a vampire, but other than that, he wasn’t willing to share anything about himself. He basically knew almost everything about you, but you knew nothing.

Anytime you asked, he just blew off the conversation, not wanting to talk about it. He always got angry, but not as angry as he did this time..

This time you really got the worst out of him.

_____________________________

!! Mentions of rape and murder in the backstory !!

Thank you for your request!! ❤️❤️

I wanted to do my own story with this picture, but then I remembered this request and it honestly fit what kind of story I was wanting to do 🤔

I was supposed to do homework but got distracted and instead made this.. I’ll get back to it in a bit, probably….. 👤
